sources.evidence: Public discover API returned NYC feed; 3 in-person AI/dev events in window, no crypto
Auth-gated search API (405/401 unauthenticated); richest crypto surface inaccessible
Public calendar API returned 0 future events
Direct fetch 403; r.jina.ai reader returned server HTML only (JS-loaded per-city cards from 403 /api/events invisible); one stale June-30 past event surfaced
405 direct; r.jina.ai surfaced only generic recurring template listings (NFT/masterclass classes) with vague 'New York' venue, likely online course spam - excluded as low-trust
Global list rendered; no NYC events (SF/London/Toronto etc.)
r.jina.ai render showed '0 Prossimi eventi / Nessun evento disponibile'
CiviCRM iCal feed (/civicrm/event/ical?reset=1) returned valid empty VCALENDAR
Only July 7 event is in Foggia, Italy (not NYC); July 29 NYC aperitivo outside +14 window
'Stay tuned for more events in 2026' valid empty state
r.jina.ai rendered Slate portal; 2 NYC in-person + 6 online webinars in window
WebFetch rendered; 2 NYC in-person info sessions (Jul 7, Jul 8)
Events in Cambridge/Detroit/Toronto only; no NYC or online in window
1 online English MBA session (Jul 9); MBA Tour stops in other cities skipped
